title: Real update notification for operating system (1013)
description: The Executive Director receives a message that there is a new critical security update to her operating system
recommendations: Devices: Mandate that devices, software, and applications are kept fully updated. Turn on automatic updates when possible.

title: Contact management system deleted suddenly (1048)
description: The contents of the contact management system were suddenly deleted
recommendations: Culture of Security: Establish a strong offboarding policy: remove access when staff leave or are fired.

title: Facebook page suspended after slanderous post (1033)
description: READ TO TABLE: Slanderous posts made on the OFD Facebook page, and Facebook page is suspended
recommendations: Culture of Security: Establish a strong offboarding policy: remove access when staff leave or are fired.

title: Office fire destroys GN's computers and phones (1044)
description:
READ TO TABLE:
Office fire caused by faulty wiring destroys local computers and phones, plus a week's worth of event plans!
recommendations: Storing Data: Store sensitive data exclusively in a trusted cloud storage service and keep a secure data backup.

title: Overheard conversation reveals embarrassing personal information about pro-human rights advocates (1030)
description:
News story - high impact:
Overheard conversation reveals embarrassing information about pro-human rights advocates
recommendations: Devices: Require password protection of all organizational devices, and personal devices that are used for work-related communications.

title: Malware on phones via fake app (1066)
description: Communications Team downloads messaging app that turns out to be fake. Malware is installed on their phones, making them unusable.
recommendations: Devices: Ensure all devices are using licensed and legitimate apps and software.

title: You've got mail- a Facebook password reset phishing email (1010)
description: Program Manager receives Facebook password reset phishing email
recommendations: Phishing: Regularly train staff on what phishing is and how to spot it and defend against it.

title: Grassroots Network organizer's phone stolen (1016)
description: Grassroots network event coordinator Ai Lin Lau's phone is stolen (INTERNAL NOTE: correct response of wipe phone will ONLY be available if MDM system has been purchased in budget)
recommendations: Devices: Use mobile device management/remote wipe features.

title: Executive Director's official OFD emails leaked (1046)
description: News story: Embarrassing emails from the Executive Director leaked
recommendations: Accounts: Hold regular training for staff on password best practices.

title: Ransomware attack disables GN computers (1055)
description:
READ TO TABLE: 
Ransomware attack hits GN computers making them unusable on the eve of the vote in parliament
recommendations: Storing Data: Store sensitive data exclusively in a trusted cloud storage service and keep a secure data backup.

title: Recording of MP disparaging OFD's leadership goes public (1058)
description:
READ TO TABLE: 
A recording of a prominent MP disparaging the OFD Executive Director as "corrupt" and "untrustworthy" is made public and goes viral!
recommendations: undefined: Use secure communication tools

title: Computers stolen (by former cleaner) (1018)
description:
READ TO TABLE: 
Former cleaner accesses office & computers stolen
recommendations: Culture of Security: Establish a strong offboarding policy; Rotate/change locks when needed.

title: SMS hack and leak (1023)
description: Volunteer sends confidential information over insecure SMS and contents are intercepted and leaked to press. Negative publicity results in 2% drop in support.
recommendations: Communications and Sharing Data: Require the use of trusted end-to-end encrypted messaging services for your organization’s sensitive communications (and ideally for all communications.)

title: Volunteer leaves network (1020)
description: Grassroots Network volunteer Alice Chen leaves the network
recommendations: Culture of Security: Establish a strong offboarding policy: remove access when staff leave or are fired.

title: Website compromised by hacker (1052)
description: Hackers post embarrassing messages on website and lock you out of website access
recommendations: Internet Security: Use a trusted, reliable web hosting provider.

title: Staffer leaves OFD (with admin access) (1032)
description: Staff with admin access to OFD Facebook account, Marvin Chase, leaves the organization for another CSO.
recommendations: Culture of Security: Establish a strong offboarding policy: remove access when staff leave or are fired.

title: Supporters' data leaked (1026)
description:
News story - medium impact
Supporters' personal info leaked, causing supporters to lose trust in OFD
recommendations: Accounts: Require 2FA on all organizational accounts, and encourage use for personal accounts as well.

title: Bittorrent installed by volunteer at office (1015)
description: You see that one of your volunteers working at the local office has installed Bittorrent and is downloading the new action hero movie
recommendations: Devices: Train staff on the risks of malware and best practices to avoid it.

title: Scandal due to grassroots network member's private chats being revealed (1029)
description:
News story - high impact:
Members of the Grassroots Network's private chats reveal scandal!
recommendations: Devices: Use mobile device management/remote wipe features.

title: DDOS attack knocks party website offline (1042)
description: DDOS Attack! News story about website knocked offline
recommendations: Internet Security: Sign up for DDOS protection for your websites.

title: Information leak caused by toddler (1017)
description: Urban Coordinator's toddler takes phone, calls Barreth Bogg's office. Urban Coordinator is discussing personal business in the background of the call.
recommendations: Devices: Require password protection of all organizational devices, and personal devices that are used for work-related communications.

title: WhatsApp chat leaked to public (1039)
description:
News story - medium impact:
OFD and GN WhatsApp chat screenshots released to public and shared alongside deep-fake images to mislead Olanians
recommendations: Culture of Security: Establish a strong offboarding policy: remove access when staff leave or are fired.

title: Supporter list stolen (1025)
description: Supporter list stolen! This valuable data helps Boggs and his allies target misleading information to supporters of the legislation, causing some to switch sides.
recommendations: Phishing: Regularly train staff on what phishing is and how to spot it and defend against it.

title: Malware corrupts critical information (1021)
description: READ TO TABLE: Computers are infected with malware corrupting critical files, including donor lists and GOTV strategies.
recommendations: Storing Data: Store sensitive data exclusively in a trusted cloud storage service and keep a secure data backup.

title: Strategy leaked (1022)
description:
News story - medium impact:
OFD outreach strategy stolen by pro-China opponents
recommendations: Accounts: Require 2FA on all organizational accounts, and encourage use for personal accounts as well.

title: Malware on computers at OFD makes them unusable (1041)
description: Malware strikes OFD computers, makes them all unusable
recommendations: Devices: Mandate that devices, software, and applications are kept fully updated. Turn on automatic updates when possible.

title: Incoming email (Spearphishing message at GN) (1005)
description: An email (spearphishing attack) from the personal account of OFD's Executive Director arrives in volunteers' inbox.
recommendations: Accounts: Require 2FA on all organizational accounts, and encourage use for personal accounts as well.

title: Cleaner quits (1007)
description: After hours office cleaner quits
recommendations: Culture of Security: Establish a strong offboarding policy; Rotate/change locks when needed.

title: Facebook page down for OFD (1065)
description:
READ TO TABLE: 
OFD FB page taken down during critical moment with inappropriate content posted, unable to get message to key supporters in parliament
recommendations: Accounts: Encourage staff to set-up 2FA on all personal accounts.

title: Laptops stolen (by former staffer) (1027)
description: Former disgruntled staffer walks into office and steals computers
recommendations: Physical Security: Use strong locks, and rotate/change them when needed. Consider setting up a camera or other office security system.

title: Facebook page hacked due to GN social media manager's weak password (1049)
description: Weak password of social media manager's personal FB account guessed by hacker; Embarrassing FB posts sent from GN page
recommendations: Accounts: Encourage staff to set-up 2FA on all personal accounts.

title: Facebook hack - HQ social media manager's FB password guessed by hacker (1040)
description: Weak password of OFD social media manager's personal FB password guessed by hacker; Embarrassing FB posts sent from OFD account
recommendations: Accounts: Encourage staff to set-up 2FA on all personal accounts.

title: Fake contact management system login page (1002)
description: Fake contact management system login page asks database users to sign in for necessary action
recommendations: Phishing: Regularly train staff on what phishing is and how to spot it and defend against it.

title: Contact management system access denied after administrator is fired (1062)
description: Contact management system administrator fired for leaking confidential information; refuses to tell you password and locks staff out of important data.
recommendations: Accounts: Implement a trusted password manager for the organization (and encourage use in staff’s personal lives as well).

title: Email server hacked (1035)
description: Internally-hosted email server hacked; All internal email conversations leaked; News story results that causes support for the proposed legislation to decline.
recommendations: Communications and Sharing Data: Use cloud-based email services such as Office 365 or Gmail for your organization.

title: Access to Facebook blocked in area around Vario (1006)
description: Local ISP suddenly begins blocking access to Facebook in the area around Vario...what steps could you take to get connected and regain access to Facebook?
recommendations: Internet Security: If appropriate for the context, choose a reputable VPN, train staff on its use, and ensure it is consistently used.

title: Amazon password databreach (1001)
description:
NEWS:
Databreach of Amazon customer passwords. Customers urged to consider whether other accounts have been affected.
recommendations: Accounts: Hold regular training for staff on password best practices.

title: FB account hacked - news story about embarrassing Facebook post (1012)
description: News story of Facebook account compromised and embarrassing Facebook post sent.
recommendations: Accounts: Require 2FA on all organizational accounts, and encourage use for personal accounts as well.

title: Photo sharing on (infected) personal USB (1000)
description: New hire uses personal USB to share photos from a protest rally
recommendations: Devices: Do not share files using USBs or plug USBs into your computers.

title: Staff phones stolen from office by burglars (1009)
description: The Grassroot Network’s office is robbed while the entire team is in a nearby park doing a teambuilding exercise. All staff mobile devices were stolen!
recommendations: Physical Security: Use strong locks, and rotate/change them when needed. Consider setting up a camera or other office security system.

title: Secret strategy stolen by opposition from unlocked desk (1043)
description: A member of Bogg's pro-China coalition pretends to volunteer at GN office; steals papers with list of key legislation supporters from an unlocked desk
recommendations: Physical Security: Keep paper documents well secured. Have and use a paper shredder and for necessary documents lockable storage space.

title: Phone call from an MP (1003)
description: A Member of Parliament that you know and trust calls you on your office phone. You know the conversation will involve confidential information.
recommendations: undefined: Use secure communication tools

title: Computer confiscated at border (1019)
description: Volunteer's computer is confiscated by immigration authorities when crossing the border. The computer was unencrypted, allowing data to easily be accessed by officials. The data is leaked, which Boggs’ team uses to portray human rights activists as reckless political agitators.
recommendations: Devices: Enable full-disk encryption on devices.

title: Juran Knott leaves the party (1011)
description: Outreach Director and Contact Management System Manager, Juran Knott, leaves the campaign over a pay dispute.
recommendations: Culture of Security: Establish a strong offboarding policy: remove access when staff leave or are fired.
